JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-13-2006 Continued To Oct-16-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Settlement Conference
Off Calendar Oct-16-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Settlement conference held in chambers with Judge Dearman.
At 2;45pm in open court, Michael Lieberman appearing for and with plaintiff Peter Patel. Robert Prisamt, defendant appearing in pro per. Settlement reached. Terms stated by the Court. If Mr. Prisamt pays $500.00 on or before 11/4/06 and he vacates the premise on or before 12/3/06, all of the past rent will be waived. If he does not pay the $500.00 on or before 11/4/06 and he does not vacate the premise on or before 12/3/06, Judgment will be entered against him for possession of the property and for $3,210.00 plus daily damages. Both parties voir dire by the Court. Mr. Lieberman will prepare an order. Court will send a copy to Mr. Prisamt. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Brenda Fields. Clerk: Ella Yip.
